topics.title: Labor Day Weekend Highlights and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The show reviews highlights from the Labor Day weekend marathon, including a voicemail from Don Rickles, various prank calls involving psychic scams, and a discussion on the career of Steve Irwin.

topics.title: Steve Irwin and Celebrity Media Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangerous stunts of the Jackass franchise, the tragic death of Steve Irwin during a stingray encounter, and the commercial nature of celebrity charity events like the Jerry Lewis telethon.

topics.title: Labor Day Weekend Highlights and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio reviews highlights from the Labor Day weekend, including a discussion on fan interactions, upcoming special segments involving Donald Trump, and commentary on celebrity news regarding John Voight and Angelina Jolie.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Media Blunders
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving the children of Tom Cruise and Brad Pitt, a report on an interview with John Hein regarding JumpTheShark.com, and a broadcast error involving a CNN reporter's hot mic during a presidential address.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Call
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion of past comedy bits and a live call with a guest who describes her lifestyle and personal habits.

topics.title: MTV Video Music Awards Incident
topics.summary: The studio explores the recurring antics of an individual known as Six who repeatedly interrupts and crashes the MTV Video Music Awards.

topics.title: Artie Lane's Relationship Status and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lane's recent breakup with Dana, his history of commitment issues, and various news items including a New York Times editorial on labor and Katie Couric's move to the CBS evening news.

topics.title: Media Trivia, Middle East Conflict, and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses a historical news broadcast during a strike, the complexities of conflict in the Middle East, and various celebrity rumors involving Mel Gibson's son and Johnny Frata.

topics.title: Celebrity Media and Pop Culture Clips
topics.summary: The studio plays a series of clips featuring celebrity antics, including Chuck Zito's upcoming appearances, Bam's walk-off from his show, John Voight’s public messages to his grandchildren, and Mike Tyson’s aggressive press conference remarks.

topics.title: Hostel Guest and Intern Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments involving crude humor regarding sports broadcasting, the host's interactions with an intern who stayed at a colleague's house, and a phone call from a caller named Jeff discussing his new job.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Industry Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a prank call involving a birthday surprise, discussions on rap music and celebrity branding, and commentary regarding satellite radio competition.

topics.title: Jerry Lewis and the Muscular Dystrophy Telethon
topics.summary: The studio discusses Jerry Lewis's long-standing involvement with the muscular dystrophy telethon, humorously speculating on his motivations and the show's enduring presence in pop culture.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various pop culture topics including the Jerry Lewis telethon, a comedy film by Barat, online gaming trends, and recent celebrity divorce news.

topics.title: Celebrity Divorce and Death News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the divorce of Joe Piscopo, the death of Steve Irwin, and the legal disputes involving Liza Minnelli.

topics.title: Media News and Upcoming Events
topics.summary: The show covers the transition of news anchors at CBS, Rosie O'Donnell joining The View, Jerry Lewis's fundraising records, and various upcoming comedy tours and performances.
